entry.title: New: HLU-18 Reso 26-110 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
RESOLUTION 26-110, REFERRING TO THE MAUI PLANNING COMMISSION PROPOSED BILLS TO AMEND THE KIHEI-MAKENA COMMUNITY PLAN AND WEST MAUI COMMUNITY PLAN, AND TO CHANGE THE ZONING FOR CERTAIN TIMESHARE, LEASEHOLD, AND OTHER PROPERTIES IN THE A-1 AND A-2 APARTMENT DISTRICTS (HLU-18)

Housing and Land Use Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
